name: Crusty Beef Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 oz. nonfat or low-fat cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Brown the meat and onions together in a large skillet over medium heat until no longer pink, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Add spaghetti sauce with mushrooms; stir to combine.
4. Arrange half of the noodles, half of the sauce, and half of the cheese evenly on the bottom of a greased casserole dish.
5. Sprinkle seasoned salt over the layer.
6. Top with another layer of noodles, sauce, and cheese.
7. Cover with aluminum foil.
8. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour.
9. Remove from oven; let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
Makes 2 casseroles. Can be doubled or halved. Freezes well.
